zh.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill於大約1295年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾斯鐵爾時，他的父親Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon23歲，母親Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie26歲。他於1350年與Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill在蘇格蘭洛包爾斯鐵爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1370年在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.Berwick-Upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill于大约1295年出生在苏格兰洛包爾斯鐵爾时，他的父亲Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon23岁，母亲Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie26岁。他于1350年与Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill在苏格兰洛包爾斯鐵爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1370年在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill was born about 1295, in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, was 23 and his mother, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, was 26. He married Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill in 1350, in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1370, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill est né environ 1295, à Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill en 1350, à Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1370, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill um 1295 in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon 23 und seine Mutter Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie 26. Er hat 1350 in Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill è nato il circa 1295 nel Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill nel 1350, nel Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1370, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichillが約1295年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアスティトチルで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordonは23歳，母Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogieは26歳であった。1350年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアスティトチルでMrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1370年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill(이)가 대략 1295년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 스티트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1350년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 스티트치에서 Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1370년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill em 1350, em Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1370, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill родился около 1295 г. в местности стичилл, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill в 1350 г. в местности стичилл, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1370 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Gordon 1st Laird of Stichill nació aproximadamente 1295, en Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam De Gordon Of That Ilk 7th Lord Of Gordon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Annabelle Strathbogie of Strathbogie, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mrs Gordon 1st Lady of Stichill en 1350, en Stitchill, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1370, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
